name: Smoked Salmon and Dill
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the horseradish, pepper, softened cream cheese, and enough cream to make the mixture spreadable.
2. Place bread slices between pieces of wax paper and roll until thin.
3. Spread the cheese mixture on each bread slice.
4. Top with smoked salmon, then sprinkle with dill.
5. Add watercress to each slice.
6. Roll up each slice tightly and wrap in plastic wrap.
7. Chill until ready to serve.
8. Slice each roll into about six pieces before serving.
